account-delete-confirm: Za chwilę usuniesz swoje konto. Wszystkie twoje szlaki zostaną usunięte. Czy chcesz kontynuować?
allow-auto-geolocate: Begin drawing a new trail from your current location
api-tokens-hint: API Tokens can be used to grant 3rd party applications access to your wanderer account.
author: Autor
bulk-edit-selected-trails: {n, plural, =1 {1 selected trail} other {# selected trails}}
bulk-edit-updated-trails: {n, plural, =1 {1 trail updated} other {# trails updated}}
category-preferences-description: Define which categories and subcategories are relevant to your trails and the order in which categories appear.
confirm-disable-category-intro: This category is still used in a few places. Review the conflicts before hiding it.
confirm-disable-category-with-trails: {count, plural, =1 {1 of your own trails uses “{name}”.} other {# of your own trails use “{name}”.}}
confirm-disable-category-active-plugin-m: Active plugins reference this category in their mappings: {plugins}.
confirm-disable-category-inactive-plugin: Prepared but inactive plugins also reference this category: {plugins}.
confirm-disable-subcategory-intro: This subcategory is still used in a few places. Review the conflicts before hiding it.
confirm-disable-subcategory-with-trails: {count, plural, =1 {1 of your own trails uses “{name}”.} other {# of your own trails use “{name}”.}}
confirm-disable-subcategory-active-plugi: Active plugins reference this subcategory in their mappings: {plugins}.
confirm-disable-subcategory-inactive-plu: Prepared but inactive plugins also reference this subcategory: {plugins}.
category-filter-hidden-active: {categories} is hidden in your category preferences.
category-mapping-help: Removed provider categories are intentionally left unmapped and will be imported without a category.
delete-list-confirm: Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć tę listę? Szlaki na liście zostaną zachowane.
delete-summit-log-confirm: Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć ten dziennik szczytu? Tej akcji nie można cofnąć.
delete-trail-confirm: Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć ten szlak? Ta akcja jest nieodwracalna.
email-not-unique: This email address is already in use.
empty-feed-explanation: Tu będą wyświetlane aktywności twoje i osób, które obserwujesz
error-during-password-reset: Nie udało się wysłać e-maila z resetowaniem hasła
hammerhead-integration-after-date-hint: If your hammerhead account is already synced with other trail databases, such as komoot or Strava, start syncing your Hammerhead data may result in duplicates. To avoid this, you can set an start date below, meaning only activities recorded after this date will be synced.
heading: Heading
hero_section_0_text: Eksploruj ekscytujące szlaki, zapisz swoje ulubione, doświadcz piękna naturalnego świata. Znajdź swoją następną przygodę!
hero_section_1_heading: Wygląda na to, że nie ma tutaj szlaków.
hero_section_1_text: Oto kilka szlaków, które mogą ci się spodobać. Możesz też przejść od razu do pełnej listy.
hero_section_1_text_alternative: Zacznij poprzez zapisanie swojej ostatniej wyprawy.
hero_section_2_text: Czy wiesz że, możesz zapisywać nie tylko piesze wycieczki ale także inne kategorie wypraw?
import-hint: Wybierz lub przeciągnij tutaj plik GPX, FIT, KML lub TCX...
plugin-auto-merge-hint: Imported trails are only merged automatically when exactly one clear match is found. The imported trail is always deleted afterwards.
plugin-after-date-hint: Set a start date to sync only trails recorded after that date. This can help avoid duplicates when older trails are already available in wanderer.
plugin-category-remap-backfilled-confirm: For {count} imported trails, the provider category was detected only after you last changed the wanderer category mapping. Apply the mapping to these trails now? Other trail data stays unchanged.
plugin-category-remap-confirm: {count} trails are affected by the category mapping changes. Apply the updated mapping to these trails now? Other trail data stays unchanged.
plugin-category-remap-confirm-unspecifie: The category mapping was changed. There are currently no imported trails that can be updated immediately. Save changes?
plugin-category-remap-dismiss-error: Could not save remap reminder preference
plugin-category-remap-error: Could not update imported trail categories
plugin-category-remap-preview-error: Could not check imported trails for category updates
plugin-category-remap-sync-hint: Some of these matches were found during a sync after the mapping was last changed.
plugin-connect-before-enabling: Connect this plugin before enabling it.
plugins-empty-description: No plugins are available on this server yet. Contact your administrator or read the installation guide.
plugin-oauth-connected-hint: This plugin is connected. If you change the OAuth credentials, reconnect it before enabling sync again.
plugin-oauth-needs-connect-hint: Save and connect this plugin before enabling sync.
plugin-privacy-hint-original: Imported trails will maintain the same visibility they have on the external platform. For example, if the original trail was public, it will be public in wanderer, even if trails are private by default according to your privacy settings.
plugin-privacy-hint-user: The original trail's visibility is discarded. Instead, the local privacy settings for trails are applied to all imported trails.
plugin-error-rate-limited: Provider rate limit reached. Try again later.
plugin-error-provider-unavailable: Provider is currently unavailable. Try again later.
plugin-error-reconnect-required: Plugin authorization expired. Reconnect the plugin.
list-public-warning: Wszystkie szlaki na tej liście staną się publiczne.
list-share-warning: Udostępnienie listy automatycznie udostępnia wszystkie zawarte w niej szlaki.
list-share-warning-update: Dodane szlaki zostaną udostępnione każdemu, kto ma dostęp do tej listy.
map-trail-preview-zoom-level: Pokazuj podglądy tras od poziomu powiększenia
mark-trail-as-completed-modal-text: Would you like to mark this trail as completed? You can change this status again at any time.
must-be-at-most-n-characters-long: Musi mieć długość co najwyżej {n} znaków
name: Nazwa
nearby-waypoint-found-text: "{name}" is close enough to merge with this waypoint. What would you like to do?
notification-summit-log-create: {user} utworzył dziennik szczytu na twoim szlaku "{trail}"
notification-summit-log-mention: {user} wspomniał o tobie w dzienniku szczytu
object-share-error: {object} musi być publiczny aby być udostępniany między instancjami.
password-reset-sent: E-mail z resetowaniem hasła został wysłany
password-reset-text: Wyślemy link do resetowania hasła na twój adres e-mail.
public-share-everyone: Everyone on the internet with the link can see this trail
public-share-limited: Only people with access can open the link
recalculating-elevation-data-hint: Ponowne przeliczenie danych dotyczących wysokości spowoduje usunięcie istniejących danych i zastąpienie ich danymi z Valhalla.
reset-route-confirm: The current route will be removed. Trail details, photos, lists and other metadata will be kept.
no-send-plugins: No connected plugin supports sending trails. Connect one in the plugin settings first.
plugin-type-trails-description: Trail plugins connect wanderer with external services and automatically sync routes or activities in the background.
settings-notification-comment-mention: Ktoś wspomniał o tobie w komentarzu
settings-notification-summit-log-create: Ktoś utworzył dziennik szczytu na twoim szlaku
settings-notification-summit-log-mention: Ktoś wspomniał o tobie w dzienniku szczytu
settings-notification-trail-mention: Ktoś wspomniał o tobie w szlaku
settings-privacy-account-private: Tylko ty możesz zobaczyć swój profil. Nie będziesz się pojawiać w wynikach wyszukiwania. Inni użytkownicy nie mogą cię obserwować ani udostępniać ci szlaków. Wciąż możesz publikować szlaki i listy.
settings-privacy-account-public: Wszyscy mogą zobaczyć twój profil. Będziesz się pojawiać w wynikach wyszukiwania. Inni użytkownicy mogą cię obserwować i udostępniać ci szlaki.
settings-privacy-lists-private: Domyślnie twoje listy są prywatne. Nikt poza tobą nie będzie mógł ich zobaczyć. Zawsze możesz zmienić to ustawienie, osobno dla każdej listy.
settings-privacy-lists-public: Domyślnie twoje listy są publiczne. Każdy będzie mógł je zobaczyć. Zawsze możesz zmienić to ustawienie, osobno dla każdej listy.
settings-privacy-trails-private: Domyślnie, twoje szlaki są prywatne. Nikt poza tobą nie będzie mógł ich zobaczyć. Zawsze możesz zmieniać to ustawienie, osobno dla każdego szlaku.
settings-privacy-trails-public: Domyślnie, twoje szlaki są publiczne. Każdy będzie mógł je zobaczyć. Zawsze możesz zmieniać to ustawienie, osobno dla każdego szlaku.
trail-has-no-gpx: This trail has no GPX data.
trail-not-in-list: Trail is not in any list
trail-merge-no-editable-target: No editable merge target is available.
trail-merge-no-similar-trails: No sufficiently similar trails were found.
trail-merge-similar-trails-found: {n, plural, =1 {1 similar trail found.} other {{n} similar trails found.}}
similar-trails-maintenance-description: This page shows groups of trails that represent the same or a very similar route multiple times. Review each group on the map and merge it into a single target trail when appropriate.
similar-trails-empty: No groups of similar trails were found right now.
similar-trails-indirect-hint: Not every trail pair in this group meets the similarity requirements. Please check the map before merging to confirm that all trails really belong together.
similar-trails-reason-highest_summit_log: Suggested as the target trail because it has the most summit logs.
similar-trails-reason-most_external_refe: Suggested as the target trail because it has the most external references.
similar-trails-reason-most_complete_cont: Suggested as the target trail because it contains the richest content.
similar-trails-reason-most_central_geome: Suggested as the target trail because it is geometrically the best fit within the group.
similar-trails-reason-oldest_trail: Suggested as the target trail because it is the oldest trail in the group.
similar-trails-reason-deterministic_fall: Suggested as the target trail because no stronger distinguishing signal was found.
trail-merge-reason-highest_summit_log_co: This trail is suggested because it has the most summit logs.
trail-merge-reason-most_external_referen: This trail is suggested because it has the most external references.
trail-merge-reason-most_complete_content: This trail is suggested because it contains the richest content.
trail-merge-reason-most_central_geometry: This trail is suggested because it is geometrically the best fit among the selected trails.
trail-merge-reason-oldest_trail: This trail is suggested because it is the oldest trail in the selection.
trail-merge-reason-deterministic_fallbac: This trail is suggested as a stable fallback.
trail-merge-reason-no_geometry_match: No suitable trail geometry match was found.
trail-merge-warning-missing_geometry: Could not compare trail geometry because GPX data is missing.
trail-merge-warning-startpoints_far_apar: Trail start points are far apart.
trail-merge-warning-endpoints_far_apart: Trail end points are far apart.
trail_merge_auth_required: You need to be signed in to merge trails.
trail_merge_actor_not_found: Your actor profile could not be loaded for the merge.
trail_merge_unknown_suggest_mode: The merge suggestion mode is invalid.
trail_merge_missing_actor: The merge could not determine the current actor.
trail_merge_missing_trail_id: The merge is missing a required trail id.
trail_merge_same_source_target: Source and target trail must be different.
trail_merge_requires_multiple_trails: Select at least two trails to merge.
trail_merge_missing_source_trail_id: A source trail is required for automatic merge suggestions.
trail_merge_source_actor_mismatch: The selected source trail does not belong to the current actor.
trail_merge_source_not_found: The selected source trail could not be found.
trail_merge_target_not_found: The selected target trail could not be found.
trail_merge_not_allowed: You do not have permission to merge these trails.
username-not-unique: This username is already taken. Please try another.
